_comment: Evosep batch detection patterns for caspa/assign_batches.py.
_format: regex applied case-insensitively to sample_id. group_plate, group_well, group_run select capture groups. Patterns tried in order; first match wins.
_gap_note: PRIMARY detector. Two consecutive runs from the same plate are a new batch when their run-number gap exceeds this value. Within a session cells are sequential (gap ~1); between sessions the gap is typically >50. Default 20 works for standard hexSCP experiments.
_well_drop_note: SECONDARY detector. Within an already-contiguous session (run gap < gap_threshold), a new batch is also triggered when the 96-well position drops by more than this value. Catches back-to-back full-plate reloads (H12->A1, drop=95) without splitting test injections (A10->A1, drop=9). Default 80.

patterns.name: evosep_standard
patterns.description: Standard Evosep naming: ..._{S{N}}-{well}_{_}_{run_number}. S{N}=physical plate, well=96-well position A1-H12, run_number=absolute injection counter (last _-separated integer).
